title: Mine RPG
description: This is combination of mods to add more content to Minecraft including bosses, biomes, creatures. This is more RPG adventure style while keeping all vanilla. No extra metals or materials are added on this pack.
body:
This is combination of mods to add more content to Minecraft including bosses, biomes, creatures. This is more RPG adventure style while keeping all vanilla. No extra metals or materials are added on this pack. Improved combat, magic weapons, better monsters and nps. 

The following mod was created from [https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) which contains custom modifications of the vanilla experience.

File: VanillaTweaks_r354814_MC1.21.x.zip
Link: [https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)

Any feedback is greatly apreciated.

This is a heavily modified version of "DB's Minecraft Refined". This version contains more than 100+ mods to improve the adventure and minor cleanup for better performance.

Link: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/dbs-minecraft-refined](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dbs-minecraft-refined)
